markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore a potential content partnership between Midi Health and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Midi's Challenge:** Scale content production while maintaining the scientific accuracy required for its sensitive medical niche (perimenopause/menopause), a key concern with AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A hybrid model using AI for speed and human experts for quality. It starts with an 8-week strategy sprint (5–10 articles) to prove value before a 12-month commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Core Offer:** \~20 high-quality editorial articles/month. This is a deliberate choice over high-volume AI output, as GrowthX believes quality is more effective for SEO and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [**Custom Work:** Additional workstreams (e.g., calculators, programmatic content) are scoped separately, adding $9–15k/month to the base cost.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

## Topics

### Midi Health's Content Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Establish Midi as the authoritative leader in midlife women's health (40+).](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [**Current Process:** A rigorous, manual workflow ensures accuracy:](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [SEO analyst identifies keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [Health writers create content.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [Midi clinicians provide expert input.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [Each piece receives two medical reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Performance:** This process has successfully built domain authority and driven rapid SERP growth.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Exploration:** Midi is evaluating AI tools (e.g., SEMrush, Profound) but is cautious about scaling with AI due to the critical need for scientific accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

### GrowthX's Hybrid Content Engine

  - [**Origin:** Founded by Marcel, who built successful organic content engines at IBM, HP, and Deepgram, where he began automating parts of the process with AI.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Model:** Blends AI automation with human expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**AI:** Accelerates research, brief generation, and drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Human:** Provides strategic direction, expert review, and final editing.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [**Team:** Includes former TechCrunch EIC and professionals with backgrounds in SEO, content marketing, and journalism.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [**Growth:** Founded \~1 year ago, now with \>60 clients and $15M ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)

### Partnership Structure & Pricing

  - [**Phase 1: 8-Week Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Prove value and build a custom content engine before a long-term commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** 5–10 published articles and a 3–6 month content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Contract**](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [**Commitment:** Requires a 12-month agreement.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [**Volume:** \~20 articles/month (a mix of net new and refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritizes quality over quantity, as GrowthX believes this is more effective for long-term SEO and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Pricing & Custom Workstreams**](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [**Base Price:** Covers either the editorial or programmatic workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [**Add-ons:** Additional workstreams (e.g., calculators, newsletters) are scoped separately, adding $9–15k/month depending on complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### GrowthX's Workflow & Examples

  - [**Workflow:** Uses an internal platform to manage the content process.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
      - [**Inputs:** Managing editor instructions, brand artifacts (personas, style guides), and a research knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Process:** AI agents generate research plans, execute research, and draft content.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [**Quality Control:** Human editors review all drafts, making inline changes and using context-aware tools for suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [**Biologica:** A similar health client for whom GrowthX built a custom workflow to handle medical claims and compliance disclaimers, replicating their expert review process.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Built a programmatic vendor directory (e.g., "Airtable vs. ClickUp") to establish authority in business spending.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [**Webflow:** Created programmatic definition and integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
      - [Send Midi case studies and success metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
      - [Analyze the content strategies of Midi's competitors (Hers, Alloy, Weight Watchers) to identify opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [**Jihan:**](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
      - [Review materials and determine if a deeper evaluation with Marcel is warranted.](https://fathom.video/share/MxAVyX24g-qHkqhJ4WVxF2yEsvA3sCCj?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
